MITMRule.http_header_cookie_priority_tip: HTTP Header and HTTP Cookie have a higher priority and will overwrite the body content
MITMRule.enable_substitute_then_discard_tip: After enabling substitution, you can discard the current request/response
MITMRule.option_no_replace_request_tip: This option only applies to requests. When enabled, the (request) packet will not be replaced, and the substituted result will be sent as an extra packet
MITMRule.select_request_or_response_header_body_t: After selecting request or response, at least one of Header and Body must be selected
MITMRule.replace_rule_effect_warning: A replacement rule has been detected. This may affect interception. Are you sure you want to enable it?
MITMRule.drag_disabled_tip: Dragging is disabled. You can only drag rules within the same status
MITMRule.save_rule_and_close_prompt: Do you want to save the rule content and close the pop-up window?
MITMRule.white_list_tip: After configuring a whitelist, the rules will no longer apply to file extensions on the whitelist. Multiple file extensions can be configured, for example: .txt/.jpg/.mp4

MITMRuleImport.copy_json_into_box_tip: You can copy JSON code into the box below

MITMRuleFromModal.group_matching_tip: Enter 0 to match all; enter a number to match the entered group; leave blank to match the first group by default
MITMRuleFromModal.regexp_result_template_tip: Use $1 or \1 or {1} to reference capture groups. When set, it overrides the comma-joined output from “Rule Group”.
MITMRuleFromModal.http_header_cookie_priority_tip: HTTP Header and HTTP Cookie have a higher priority and will overwrite the body content
MITMRuleFromModal.enter_content_to_replace_tip: Enter the content you want to replace, can be empty~
MITMRuleFromModal.url_specific_rule_tip: The rule will only be effective for this URL; regular expressions are supported

RuleContent.use_right_tool_generate_regex: You can use the tool on the right to automatically generate a regex
RuleContent.select_in_editor_generate_regex: Select content in the editor to automatically generate a regex

ProxyConfig.title: Proxy Rules Configuration
ProxyConfig.tip: Customize Proxy Rule Groups According To Your Needs
ProxyConfig.disable_add_new_route: Please configure at least one proxy node.
ProxyConfig.confirm_delete_all: Are You Sure You Want To Delete? This Cannot Be Undone
ProxyConfig.valid_proxy_address_tip: Please Enter Valid Proxy Address (E.g.: http://127.0.0.1:8080)
ProxyConfig.proxy_address_placeholder: Please select or enter a proxy address. If the proxy requires a password, the format is: http://user:pass@ip:port
ProxyConfig.migration_title: Whether to migrate the downstream agent configuration data to the new version; if not, it is considered that the historical data should be abandoned.
ProxyConfig.address_tip: After configuration, only the target address uses the proxy, and all other traffic does not use the proxy.
ProxyConfig.delete_point_tips: This Points is still referenced by {i} rules; deleting it will remove it from those rules as well. Continue?
ProxyConfig.detectionLoading: Testing in progress, please wait patiently...
ProxyConfig.disable_point_tips: This Points is still referenced by {i} rules; Disable it will remove it from those rules as well. Continue?
ProxyConfig.select_disabled_tip: The selected proxy has been disabled. We recommend using a different, available proxy.
ProxyConfig.destination_address_tips: To specify a lightning strike area that doesn't use a proxy, add an exclamation mark (!) indicating a distant location, for example: !*.example.com

AdvancedConfiguration.SNI_extra: An empty value indicates that no SNI is sent, and the mapping rule has higher priority than the forced SNI.
AdvancedConfiguration.hosts_mapping_priority_help: When enabled, Hosts file mapping rules are matched before forwarding traffic to the downstream proxy.
AdvancedConfiguration.add_message: Please add after completing the setup

MITMPage.serverClosed: MITM hijacking server has been closed
MITMPage.serverErrorOrClosed: MITM hijacking server error or closed

MITMServer.MITMPage_tips: Interactive plugins: please click 'Start Hijacker' before checking them

ImportLocalPlugin.accessRepoViaProxy: Access code repositories that are inaccessible from mainland China via proxy: e.g., http://127.0.0.1:7890
ImportLocalPlugin.enterLocalPluginPath: Please enter the local plugin path
ImportLocalPlugin.enterPluginID: Please enter plugin IDs, separated by 'commas' or 'new lines'...
ImportLocalPlugin.enterNucleiPoCLocalPath: Please enter the Nuclei PoC local path
ImportLocalPlugin.externalResourceWarning: Importing external resources has potential risks and may introduce malicious code or payloads, leading to data leaks, system compromises, and other serious consequences. Please carefully consider the necessity of importing external resources and ensure the source is trustworthy and the content is safe. If you must use external resources, it is recommended to prioritize official, secure versions or write your own controllable data sources. Additionally, please keep your system and software up to date, promptly fix known vulnerabilities, and maintain daily security protection.

MITMFilters.filterJSHelp: When enabled, filter static JS from build/bundle artifacts

MITMAdvancedFilters.pleaseCompleteCondition: Please complete the added condition before adding a new one

MITMServerForm.hijackHostHelp: Remote mode can be changed to 0.0.0.0 to listen on all network interfaces
MITMServerForm.downstreamProxyHelp: Set proxy for requests passing through this MITM, usually used to access sites unreachable from mainland China or special/internal networks. Also for passive scanning. Format: http://user:pass@ip:port
MITMServerForm.http2SupportHelp: Enable HTTP/2.0 hijacking. If disabled, it falls back to HTTP/1.1. If HTTP2 negotiation fails, it also falls back automatically.

httpsConfigHelp.gmTLS: GM-TLS hijacking, connects to targets using GM-TLS
httpsConfigHelp.randomJA3: Randomize ClientHello to evade server TLS fingerprint detection (TLS fingerprinting identifies clients by handshake features)
httpsConfigHelp.default: No GM-TLS or random TLS fingerprinting

MITMServerForm.disableKeepAliveHelp: Disable keep-alive for MITM. Each hijacked connection handles one request/response then closes.
MITMServerForm.contentRuleHelp: Use rules to match, replace, tag, or colorize, and set effective locations.
MITMServerForm.replaceRuleWarning: Replacement rules are enabled and may affect hijacking. Confirm starting?

PluginTunHijack.connectivityChecking: TUN Hijack Connectivity Check In Progress
PluginTunHijack.connectivityCheckPluginNotFound: Local plugin '{{name}}' was not found. Install the plugin first, or change the plugin name in code to the actual script name.

MITMChromeLauncher.save_user_data_help: To open a new window, please set a new path to store user data
MITMChromeLauncher.launchProxyChrome:
This button will launch a Chrome instance with the proxy correctly configured (using the system Chrome settings)
No additional proxy setup is required, while keeping the testing browser separate from your daily browser
MITMChromeLauncher.proxyBrowserNotice:
Note:
The pre-configured browser enables --ignore-certificate-errors
This option is active and will ignore all certificate errors. Only recommended for security testing
MITMChromeLauncher.preset_params_desc: Preset parameters can be configured in More Parameters. Minimal parameters cannot be configured. If the preset parameters fail to start, please choose minimal parameters to start.
MITMChromeLauncher.unsaved_edits: There are unsaved edits, please click the save button
MITMChromeLauncher.reset_default_params_confirm: Are you sure you want to reset all parameters to default? This will lose all custom settings.
MITMChromeLauncher.close_all_no_config_chrome_success: Closed all configuration-free Chrome instances successfully
MITMChromeLauncher.close_all_chrome_failed: Failed to close all Chrome instances
MITMChromeLauncher.chrome_launch_failed: Chrome launch failed: {err}, please try launching with the default configuration
MITMChromeLauncher.warning_content: A replacement rule is enabled and may affect interception. Are you sure you want to start?
MITMChromeLauncher.restore_default_params_content: Are you sure you want to reset all parameters to their defaults? This will lose all custom settings.

MITMFormAdvancedConfiguration.saveAndCloseConfirm: Do you want to save the advanced configuration and close the dialog?
MITMFormAdvancedConfiguration.gmTLSFirstHelp: Prefer GM TLS first; if the connection fails, fall back to regular TLS.
MITMFormAdvancedConfiguration.gmTLSOnlyHelp: When enabled, only GM TLS will be supported.
MITMFormAdvancedConfiguration.proxyAuthHelp: Enable authentication for the hijack proxy and configure it in the proxy client.
MITMFormAdvancedConfiguration.disableInitPageHelp: When enabled, startup without configuration will not visit the initial page.
MITMFormAdvancedConfiguration.setBeforeAdd: Please finish setting the last item before adding a new one
MITMFormAdvancedConfiguration.mtlsHelp: Used for HTTPS packet capture with client authentication enabled via mTLS (Mutual TLS).

MITMFiltersModal.name_placeholder: Please enter a name for the filter configuration...
MITMFiltersModal.update_filter_failed: Failed to update MITM filter status: {err}
MITMFiltersModal.update_hijack_failed: Failed to update hijack filter status: {err}
MITMFiltersModal.hijack_tip_1: Data matching the conditions will automatically jump to manual hijacking, and the rest will pass through automatically
MITMFiltersModal.hijack_tip_2: By default, the basic configuration matches keywords except Content-Type and file suffix. For regex and glob matching, configure it in Advanced Configuration
MITMFiltersModal.drag_hint_suffix: to upload; pasting code is also supported

MITMAddTLS.name_placeholder: Please give your certificate pair a name (required)
